title: Ubiquiti UACC-OFC-M2-LULU-0.5M-50 - optical patch cord LCupc/LCupc, Duplex, Multi-mode 50/125, 0,5m (50ks)
category: Ubiquiti UACC-OFC-M2-LULU-0.5M-50 - optical patch cord LCupc/LCupc, Duplex,…
description: Optical cable suitable for connecting both active and passive devices. It uses singlemode 50/125 (OM4) fiber, terminated with two LC connectors on both ends. The total cable diameter is 2 mm The ferrule polishing is in UPC (Ultra Physical Contact) style. The sheath is LSZH (Low Smoke Zero Halogen) The cable length is 0,5 m, pack of 50 pcs
